requirement_topic.en: EMC — Bare Induction Motor (no integrated electronics) under ABNT/CISPR standards
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）— 纯感应电机（无集成电子装置）ABNT/CISPR 标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）— 純感應電機（無集成電子裝置）ABNT/CISPR 標準

summary.en: A bare mains-fed three-phase induction motor with no integrated electronic control is generally a passive rotating machine and does not fall under specific INMETRO compulsory EMC certification requirements for motors in Brazil. Brazil adopts CISPR publications through ABNT (e.g., ABNT NBR CISPR 11, ABNT NBR CISPR 14) for industrial, scientific, and medical equipment and household appliances. For a bare industrial motor, no dedicated mandatory ABNT EMC Portaria equivalent to the EU EMC Directive has been identified as of the last-verified date. However, if the motor is sold with or integrated into a variable-frequency drive (VFD) or power-electronics-based system, the combined apparatus may be subject to INMETRO EMC requirements and the ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 requirements for power drive systems. [Note: Verify INMETRO compulsory product scope for drive systems at inmetro.gov.br before import.]
summary.zh: 不含集成电子控制装置的纯三相感应电机通常属于被动旋转机械，不适用于巴西针对电机的专项 INMETRO 强制性 EMC 认证要求。巴西通过 ABNT 采用 CISPR 出版物（如 ABNT NBR CISPR 11、ABNT NBR CISPR 14），适用于工业、科学、医疗设备及家用电器。截至最后核实日，尚未发现针对纯工业电机的专项强制性 ABNT EMC 部令（类似欧盟 EMC 指令）。但若电机与变频器（VFD）或电力电子系统一同出售或集成，该组合设备可能须符合 INMETRO EMC 要求以及 ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 对电力传动系统的要求。【注：进口前请于 inmetro.gov.br 核实驱动系统的 INMETRO 强制产品范围。】
summary.zht: 不含集成電子控制裝置的純三相感應電機通常屬於被動旋轉機械，不適用於巴西針對電機的專項 INMETRO 強制性 EMC 認證要求。巴西通過 ABNT 採用 CISPR 出版物（如 ABNT NBR CISPR 11、ABNT NBR CISPR 14），適用於工業、科學、醫療設備及家用電器。截至最後核實日，尚未發現針對純工業電機的專項強制性 ABNT EMC 部令（類似歐盟 EMC 指令）。但若電機與變頻器（VFD）或電力電子系統一同出售或集成，該組合設備可能須符合 INMETRO EMC 要求以及 ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 對電力傳動系統的要求。【注：進口前請於 inmetro.gov.br 核實驅動系統的 INMETRO 強制產品範圍。】

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR CISPR 11 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment — Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics (Brazilian adoption of CISPR 11)
ABNT NBR CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 — Household appliances and similar equipment EMC (not directly applicable to industrial motors but provides framework)
ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 — Adjustable speed electrical power drive systems — Part 3: EMC requirements (Brazilian adoption of IEC 61800-3; applicable to VFD-integrated motor systems)
Lei 9.933/1999 — General INMETRO compulsory certification law

summary.en: China does not impose a dedicated mandatory EMC standard on bare three-phase induction motors under CCC certification. For variable-speed drive systems, GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equivalent to IEC 61800-3:2004) governs EMC requirements and is a recommended (GB/T) standard, not a mandatory (GB) standard. Most standard industrial motors in China are not subject to compulsory EMC pre-market certification. The Brazilian situation for bare motors is similar — no dedicated mandatory EMC pre-market certification. The gap widens significantly when a VFD is integrated.
summary.zh: 中国对纯三相感应电机在 CCC 认证框架下没有专门的强制性 EMC 标准。对于变速驱动系统，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同 IEC 61800-3:2004）规定了 EMC 要求，为推荐性国家标准（GB/T），非强制性标准（GB）。中国大多数标准工业电机不须进行强制性 EMC 上市前认证。巴西对纯电机的情况类似，同样无专项强制性 EMC 上市前认证。但集成变频器后，差距将显著扩大。
summary.zht: 中國對純三相感應電機在 CCC 認證框架下沒有專門的強制性 EMC 標準。對於變速驅動系統，GB/T 12668.3-2012（等同 IEC 61800-3:2004）規定了 EMC 要求，為推薦性國家標準（GB/T），非強制性標準（GB）。中國大多數標準工業電機不須進行強制性 EMC 上市前認證。巴西對純電機的情況類似，同樣無專項強制性 EMC 上市前認證。但集成變頻器後，差距將顯著擴大。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 12668.3-2012 (equiv. IEC 61800-3:2004) — Adjustable speed electrical power drive systems, EMC requirements (recommended standard only)
No mandatory CCC EMC requirement for standard bare industrial three-phase motors

gap.en: For a bare three-phase induction motor: both China and Brazil currently lack a dedicated mandatory EMC certification requirement, so the gap is minimal for bare motors. For motor+VFD integrated systems: Brazil requires compliance with ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 and INMETRO may require compulsory certification for the combined apparatus. China's GB/T 12668.3-2012 is only a recommended standard and is based on the older IEC 61800-3:2004 (versus the current IEC 61800-3:2022). The gap for drive-integrated systems is material. Exporters shipping VFD-integrated motors to Brazil should verify the current INMETRO compulsory scope for power drive systems.
gap.zh: 对于纯三相感应电机：中国和巴西目前均无专门的强制性 EMC 认证要求，纯电机的差距较小。对于电机+变频器集成系统：巴西要求符合 ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3，INMETRO 可能要求对组合装置进行强制认证。中国的 GB/T 12668.3-2012 仅为推荐性标准，且基于较旧的 IEC 61800-3:2004（而非现行 IEC 61800-3:2022）。对于驱动集成系统，差距较为显著。向巴西出口集成变频器电机的出口商应核实电力传动系统当前的 INMETRO 强制产品范围。
gap.zht: 對於純三相感應電機：中國和巴西目前均無專門的強制性 EMC 認證要求，純電機的差距較小。對於電機+變頻器集成系統：巴西要求符合 ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3，INMETRO 可能要求對組合裝置進行強制認證。中國的 GB/T 12668.3-2012 僅為推薦性標準，且基於較舊的 IEC 61800-3:2004（而非現行 IEC 61800-3:2022）。對於驅動集成系統，差距較為顯著。向巴西出口集成變頻器電機的出口商應核實電力傳動系統當前的 INMETRO 強制產品範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Not mandatory for bare passive induction motors; mandatory or effectively mandatory for motor+VFD drive systems under ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 and INMETRO scope — verify current status
mandatory_status.cn: Not mandatory for bare industrial motors; GB/T 12668.3 recommended only for drive systems — no mandatory CCC EMC step for most configurations

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (official)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For a bare three-phase induction motor exported to Brazil, dedicated mandatory INMETRO EMC certification is not currently established, reducing the EMC-specific gap relative to China. For motor+VFD integrated systems, ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 compliance and INMETRO compulsory certification for the combined apparatus may be required — verify scope with INMETRO DCONF before shipment. The VFD-integrated gap is significant and more closely parallels the EU EMC Directive situation.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】对于出口巴西的纯三相感应电机，目前尚未确立专门的 INMETRO 强制性 EMC 认证要求，与中国相比 EMC 专项差距较小。对于电机+变频器集成系统，可能需要符合 ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 并取得组合装置的 INMETRO 强制认证——发货前请向 INMETRO DCONF 核实适用范围。变频器集成系统的差距较为显著，与欧盟 EMC 指令情况较为接近。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】對於出口巴西的純三相感應電機，目前尚未確立專門的 INMETRO 強制性 EMC 認證要求，與中國相比 EMC 專項差距較小。對於電機+變頻器集成系統，可能需要符合 ABNT NBR IEC 61800-3 並取得組合裝置的 INMETRO 強制認證——發貨前請向 INMETRO DCONF 核實適用範圍。變頻器集成系統的差距較為顯著，與歐盟 EMC 指令情況較為接近。
